sessions.title: INC27080102 — corrected diagnosis, handed activity-id hypothesis to Niv
sessions.summary: Reopened INC27080102. Bumped global MCP_TIMEOUT to 120s to reconnect hades MCP. Queried Hades directly: profile is at _version 3 with lastUpdatingCallId matching the May 30 test event — stream-combiner is processing this BU correctly. Yesterday's stream-combiner-stopped theory was wrong. Real issue: activity doc id=7006487039 stuck at _version 1 since May 28; mapping uses customerNo as activity.id, suspect create-only suppression. Drafted handoff to Niv's infra team to verify whether any cdpActivities doc has _version > 1.

sessions.title: C4C V2 Connector — PATCH Update Contact verified, all 3 PATCH actions done
sessions.summary: Closed out the PATCH testing phase for CXCDP-36055. Verified PATCH Update Contact end-to-end on John Doe (1622470, Contoso Corp): firstName updated to 'Johnny', academicTitle set to code '0001' (Dr.). Two ingest calls: callID bb9fb4aa50b24142b027cffa999f64fc (firstName-only success), then callID 27c10067f7ab4b82b31f11a7911573dc (with academicTitle code). Key learning: C4C code-list fields (academicTitle, etc.) require 4-char codes per OpenAPI maxLength:4, not free-text labels — first attempt with 'Dr.' landed in CDP but C4C silently dropped it. Reusing existing Group-condition CX Flow worked for Contact PATCH — organizationId in ingest triggers Group event. All three PATCH actions (IndivCustomer, Account, Contact) now verified end-to-end. Memory file added: reference-c4c-code-list-fields. Next: CloudEvents phase.

sessions.title: INC27665093 root-cause confirmed, CXCDP-38893 repro pushed
sessions.summary: Re-investigated INC27665093 with hades MCP back online. Pulled CDC accounts.search response from idx job logs (jobId 65915377925046e6a92a5abfce29c20f) — confirmed valo IS in payload as 1-level leaf alongside 2-level marketing/terms. Walker drops it because outer loop passes leaf as innerPref, then casts Boolean.TRUE to JSONObject on line 360. Added productionMixedShape_topLevelValoLeaf_isDropped test (commit 57306158, PR #29). Posted comment 38557039 on CXCDP-38893 with structural failure mode and fix direction. Customer linked CXCDP-38893 to the incident. Yesterdays diagnosis (CDC outbound config issue) was wrong — saved lessons to shared KB and personal memory: when you have a jobId, find the payload in the job logs (not by re-deriving from upstream/downstream observations).
